description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a PowerShell script on a Windows runner using the tags powershell, windows, and mssql, with a global before_script that executes `git --version`. Define a single stage called build and add a ps_build job in that stage that runs the command `./build-ci.ps1`. Configure the job to publish artifacts `./coverage` and `./src/TT.Tests/TestResults/TestResults.xml` that expire after 30 days, and to generate a JUnit report from `./src/TT.Tests/TestResults/TestResults.xml`. Include a coverage pattern `/##teamcity\[buildStatisticValue key='CodeCoverageS' value='(\d+\.?\d*)'\]/` for code‑coverage extraction. Set workflow rules so the pipeline triggers on merge‑request events, on tag pushes, or on commits to the default branch.
